description: You are a junior open-source contributor participating in the Sugar Labs developer community. Your task is to audit the platform's activity codebase and generate a metric report ranking all installed activities by their total lines of Python code. Create and execute a Bash script at /home/ga/Documents/analyze_activities.sh that analyzes activity directories in /usr/share/sugar/activities/ (folders ending in .activity). For each activity containing at least one .py file, the script must calculate the total number of Python files and the total lines of code across those files. Generate a CSV report at /home/ga/Documents/sugar_metrics.csv with the header 'Activity,Python_Files,Total_LOC', sorted numerically by the Total_LOC column in descending order.
